title: Leatherface: Texas Chainsaw Massacre III
original_title: Leatherface: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre III
overview: Two college students driving coast to coast are lured off the main highway and onto a deserted Texas road were they are stalked by the menacing Leatherface and his family.
